pub surgeist_style::Value::Visibility(surgeist_style::Visibility)

pub const fn surgeist_style::Value::interpolation(&self) -> surgeist_style::Interpolation

pub surgeist_style::WritingMode::VerticalLr

pub struct surgeist_style::Node<'a, Id>
pub surgeist_style::Node::attributes: &'a [surgeist_retained::string::Attribute]
pub surgeist_style::Node::classes: &'a [surgeist_retained::string::Class]
pub surgeist_style::Node::id: Id
pub surgeist_style::Node::key: core::option::Option<&'a surgeist_retained::identity::Key>
pub surgeist_style::Node::role: surgeist_retained::element::Role
pub surgeist_style::Node::state: &'a surgeist_retained::state::State
pub surgeist_style::Node::tag: core::option::Option<&'a surgeist_retained::string::Tag>
pub surgeist_style::Node::text: bool
impl<'a, Id> surgeist_style::Node<'a, Id>
pub fn surgeist_style::Node<'a, Id>::has_state(&self, flag: surgeist_style::StateFlag) -> bool

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::border_width_edges(&self) -> surgeist_style::Edges

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::display(&self) -> surgeist_style::Display
pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::font_size(&self) -> surgeist_style::Length

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::height(&self) -> surgeist_style::Length

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::margin_edges(&self) -> surgeist_style::Edges
pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::new() -> Self

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::transition_duration(&self) -> f32

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::visibility(&self) -> surgeist_style::Visibility
pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::width(&self) -> surgeist_style::Length
impl core::default::Default for surgeist_style::Resolved
pub fn surgeist_style::Resolved::default() -> Self

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolver::new(sheet: surgeist_style::Sheet) -> Self

pub fn surgeist_style::Resolver::sheet(&self) -> &surgeist_style::Sheet
impl surgeist_style::Resolver
pub fn surgeist_style::Resolver::clear_cache_for_changes(&mut self, changes: &surgeist_retained::change::ChangeSet)
pub struct surgeist_style::Rule

pub fn surgeist_style::Rule::selector(&self) -> &surgeist_style::Selector
pub fn surgeist_style::Rule::when(self, conditions: impl core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = surgeist_style::Condition>) -> Self

pub struct surgeist_style::Sheet
impl surgeist_style::Sheet
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::candidate_rule_count<T: surgeist_style::Tree>(&self, tree: &T, id: <T as surgeist_style::Tree>::Id) -> surgeist_style::Result<usize>
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::conditional_rule(self, selector: surgeist_style::Selector, declarations: surgeist_style::Declarations, conditions: impl core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = surgeist_style::Condition>) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::conditional_rules(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &surgeist_style::Rule>
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::container_change(&self) -> surgeist_style::Change
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::extend(&mut self, rules: impl core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = surgeist_style::Rule>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::new() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::push_conditional_rule(&mut self, selector: surgeist_style::Selector, declarations: surgeist_style::Declarations, conditions: impl core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = surgeist_style::Condition>) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::push_rule(&mut self, selector: surgeist_style::Selector, declarations: surgeist_style::Declarations) -> &mut Self
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rule(self, selector: surgeist_style::Selector, declarations: surgeist_style::Declarations) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rule_count(&self) -> usize
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rules(&self) -> &[surgeist_style::Rule]
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rules_for_class<'a>(&'a self, class: &'a surgeist_retained::string::Class) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &'a surgeist_style::Rule> + 'a
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rules_for_key<'a>(&'a self, key: &'a surgeist_retained::identity::Key) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &'a surgeist_style::Rule> + 'a
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rules_for_selector<'a>(&'a self, selector: &'a surgeist_style::Selector) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &'a surgeist_style::Rule> + 'a
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::rules_for_tag<'a>(&'a self, tag: &'a surgeist_retained::string::Tag) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &'a surgeist_style::Rule> + 'a
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::unconditional_rules(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &surgeist_style::Rule>
pub const fn surgeist_style::Sheet::version(&self) -> surgeist_style::Version
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::viewport_change(&self) -> surgeist_style::Change
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for surgeist_style::Sheet
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::eq(&self, other: &Self) -> bool
impl core::default::Default for surgeist_style::Sheet
pub fn surgeist_style::Sheet::default() -> Self

pub fn surgeist_style::TextValue::size(self, size: surgeist_style::Length) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::TextValue::strikethrough(self, strikethrough: surgeist_text::style::Decoration) -> Self

pub const fn surgeist_style::TextValue::underline(self, underline: surgeist_text::style::Decoration) -> Self

pub const fn surgeist_style::TextValue::word_break(self, word_break: surgeist_text::style::WordBreak) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::TextValue::wrap(self, wrap: surgeist_text::style::Wrap) -> Self
impl core::default::Default for surgeist_style::TextValue
pub fn surgeist_style::TextValue::default() -> Self
pub struct surgeist_style::TrackRepeat

pub fn surgeist_style::TrackRepeat::auto_fill(components: alloc::vec::Vec<surgeist_style::GridTrackComponent>) -> surgeist_style::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_style::TrackRepeat::auto_fit(components: alloc::vec::Vec<surgeist_style::GridTrackComponent>) -> surgeist_style::Result<Self>

pub surgeist_style::TrackSizing::min: surgeist_style::MinTrackSizing

pub struct surgeist_style::Viewport
impl surgeist_style::Viewport
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::height(self) -> core::option::Option<f32>
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::max_height(height: f32) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::max_width(width: f32) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::min_height(height: f32) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::min_width(width: f32) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::new(width: f32, height: f32) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::query() -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_style::Viewport::width(self) -> core::option::Option<f32>
pub trait surgeist_style::Tree
pub type surgeist_style::Tree::Id: core::marker::Copy + core::cmp::Eq + core::hash::Hash
pub fn surgeist_style::Tree::children(&self, id: Self::Id, traversal: surgeist_style::Traversal) -> surgeist_style::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = Self::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_style::Tree::node(&self, id: Self::Id) -> surgeist_style::Result<surgeist_style::Node<'_, Self::Id>>
pub fn surgeist_style::Tree::parent(&self, id: Self::Id, traversal: surgeist_style::Traversal) -> surgeist_style::Result<core::option::Option<Self::Id>>
pub fn surgeist_style::Tree::previous_sibling(&self, id: Self::Id, traversal: surgeist_style::Traversal) -> surgeist_style::Result<core::option::Option<Self::Id>>
pub fn surgeist_style::Tree::version_hint(&self) -> core::option::Option<u64>
impl<'a> surgeist_style::Tree for surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>
pub type surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>::Id = surgeist_retained::identity::Id
pub fn surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>::children(&self, id: Self::Id, traversal: surgeist_style::Traversal) -> surgeist_style::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = Self::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>::node(&self, id: Self::Id) -> surgeist_style::Result<surgeist_style::Node<'_, Self::Id>>
pub fn surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>::parent(&self, id: Self::Id, traversal: surgeist_style::Traversal) -> surgeist_style::Result<core::option::Option<Self::Id>>
pub fn surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>::previous_sibling(&self, id: Self::Id, traversal: surgeist_style::Traversal) -> surgeist_style::Result<core::option::Option<Self::Id>>
pub fn surgeist_retained::snapshot::Snapshot<'a>::version_hint(&self) -> core::option::Option<u64>
pub fn surgeist_style::color(rgba: u32) -> surgeist_style::Color
pub type surgeist_style::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, surgeist_style::Error>
